name: Residence Permit Lithuania (front side)
description: Lithuanian Residence Permit card — front side. Covers all 15 fields in the BDA layout.
extraction_prompt: Extract all fields from this Lithuanian Residence Permit (front side). Return JSON with all sections including personal data, document metadata, permit details and additional info.

document_type.instruction: The type of document as stated on the card (e.g., RESIDENCE PERMIT, LEIDIMAS GYVENTI)

document_part.instruction: Which side of the document is being processed — should be Front for this blueprint

document_number.instruction: The unique document number printed on the card

issuing_country.instruction: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code of the issuing authority (e.g., LTU)

document_language.instruction: ISO 639-1 code of the primary language of the document (e.g., lt)

surname.instruction: The surname or last name as printed on the document

given_name.instruction: The first name or given name as printed on the document

sex.instruction: Gender converted to M/F format (e.g., VYR. → M, MOT. → F, MALE → M, FEMALE → F)

nationality.instruction: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code of the holder's nationality (e.g., RUS, UKR, BLR)

date_of_birth.instruction: Date of birth converted to YYYY-MM-DD format from the printed date

permit_type.instruction: The type of residence permit as stated on the document (e.g., LAIKINAS, NUOLATINIS, ILGALAIKIS)

expiry_date.instruction: Expiration date converted to YYYY-MM-DD format from the printed date

remarks.instruction: Any remarks, notes, or additional text printed on the card

personal_number.instruction: The personal identification number (asmens kodas) as printed on the document

card_access_number.instruction: The card access number or check digit sequence printed on the card
